name: Pasta Salad Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with vegetable cooking spray according to directions.
2. Saute garlic until fragrant.
3. Add broccoli, red pepper, carrot, and tomato; stir to heat through.
4. Stir in basil.
5. Cook pasta separately and drain.
6. Combine cooked pasta with sauteed vegetables.
7. Pour olive oil and vinegar over the mixture.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Toss well to combine. Serve warm or cold.
